instruction: The codesandbox icon has two problems: it's been tinted green AND the canvas is clipping it (72x72). Restore both the color and the viewBox.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 72 72" width="72" height="72">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="72" height="72" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/codesandbox.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #22c55e" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"/><polyline points="7.5 4.21 12 6.81 16.5 4.21"/><polyline points="7.5 19.79 7.5 14.6 3 12"/><polyline points="21 12 16.5 14.6 16.5 19.79"/><polyline points="3.27 6.96 12 12.01 20.73 6.96"/><line x1="12" y1="22.08" x2="12" y2="12"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/codesandbox.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"/><polyline points="7.5 4.21 12 6.81 16.5 4.21"/><polyline points="7.5 19.79 7.5 14.6 3 12"/><polyline points="21 12 16.5 14.6 16.5 19.79"/><polyline points="3.27 6.96 12 12.01 20.73 6.96"/><line x1="12" y1="22.08" x2="12" y2="12"/></g>
</svg>
